# Let's implement normalization and search
import re
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')

def normalize_ar(text):
    # remove tatweel
    text = text.replace('\u0640', '')
    # remove diacritics
    text = arabic_diacritics.sub('', text)
    # normalize alef variants
    text = re.sub('[إأآا]', 'ا', text)
    # normalize hamza variants
    text = re.sub('[ؤئ]', 'ء', text)
    # normalize taa marbuta to ha? maybe keep
    # collapse multiple spaces and punctuation removal
    # remove punctuation and symbols
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\u0600-\u06FF\sء]', ' ', text)  # keep Arabic letters, digits, underscore, whitespace, hamza
    # replace underscore and english letters if any, and numbers to spaces?
    text = re.sub(r'[_]', ' ', text)
    # collapse whitespace
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    # convert to lowercase (not applicable)
    return text

# Query snippet
query = "إِنَّ الْمُتَ"
norm_q = normalize_ar(query)
norm_q, query
